title: Coords Logger
description: A Simple Mod That Adds A Key Bind For Logging Your Current Coordinates In Chat.
body:
# Coords Logger This mod allows you to save your current coordinates by logging it in chat (**Coords are only visible to you**). ![Mod Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34835e8aec4b13a1adb1fbd43185664e0991deab.png)
## Recommandation: I recommend paring this with mods like [**More Chat History**](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) for better experience.
## Settings/Keybinds Key is not bound by default, you have to go to Options > Controls > Key Binds and bind it yourself. ![Keybinds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2812666d55d6c1c2e2ab65e37a7f052434382c6b.png)
